segments.text: Welcome, traveler. Open the Indian eVisa portal. All those colors feel like a bureaucratic rangoli. The quest begins now.
segments.subtitle: Step 1: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page

segments.text: Hit Apply like it's a win-a-million-dollars link. Boom, the form appears, blue, white, and ready for your life story.
segments.subtitle: Step 2: Open the eVisa application form start page

segments.text: Tell them who you are. United States. Ordinary Passport. Diplomatic passport holders can skip this tutorial.
segments.subtitle: Step 3: Select nationality and passport type for the applicant

segments.text: Choose your Port of Arrival. Today we're catching sea breeze at Agatti Seaport. Fancy. And now the portal enters its meditation break.
segments.fallback_text: Choose the port of arrival and wait for the portal.
segments.subtitle: Step 4: Choose the port of arrival for the application

segments.text: And now we wait. This blank screen is digital dharma. Check your sunscreen, respect the spice, maybe hydrate. Government loading bars move only after enlightenment.
segments.fallback_text: The portal is taking a meditation break.
segments.subtitle: And now we wait. This blank screen is digital dharma. Check your sunscreen, respect the spice, maybe hydrate. Government loading bars move only after enlightenment.

segments.text: Still nothing? Not a glitch. A spiritual test. Namaste, loading screen, please have mercy on us. Stay with me.
segments.subtitle: Still waiting, stay with me.

segments.text: We're back. Add the birth date and your email. Use one you actually check, not batman123 at gmail.
segments.fallback_text: Fill the birth date and email.
segments.subtitle: Step 5: Fill date of birth and email confirmation

segments.text: Choose the service: 30-Day e-Tourist Visa. The taster menu of visas. Tourism, recreation, all the hits.
segments.subtitle: Step 6: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)

segments.text: Set the arrival date and tick the instructions box. We are almost at the good part.
segments.fallback_text: Set the arrival date and acknowledge the instructions.
segments.subtitle: Step 7: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions

segments.text: Final boss: captcha. We stop here for safety, but India is right around the corner.
segments.fallback_text: And that's a wrap for Overpass.
segments.subtitle: Step 8: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
